choice: Yes: v1 models RMDs on the tax-deferred bucket using the IRS Uniform Lifetime Table (start age per current law, 73/75 by birth year). RMD amounts are withdrawn, taxed as ordinary income, and any excess over that year's spending need is reinvested into the post-tax bucket.
rationale: User explicitly asked for RMD accounting; rollover IRAs make RMDs a material forced-income effect the Excel ignored
